topic: Automating TradingView strategy alerts via AlphaInsider platform
summary: A short walkthrough demonstrating how to connect a TradingView backtest to AlphaInsider.com and then to an Alpaca brokerage account for automated trade execution. The video promotes AlphaInsider as a platform where users can upload, share, and auto-trade strategies. It ends with a call to action to watch a full tutorial video.
